items.name: Harshani Srimalika
items.text: Yasith delivered a modern, responsive web application that matched our requirements perfectly. Communication was clear, timelines were respected, and the final result exceeded expectations. Highly recommended for professional web development work.

items.name: Trevor Virtue
items.text: The mobile application was developed smoothly with great attention to performance and user experience. Yasith was flexible with changes and provided valuable technical suggestions throughout the project.

items.name: Emma Miller
items.text: Outstanding graphic design work for our branding and social media campaigns. The designs were creative, consistent, and delivered on time. A reliable designer who understands client vision well.

items.name: Hassan Ahmed
items.text: From website development to branding materials, everything was handled professionally. The quality of both design and development was excellent, making the overall experience smooth and stress-free.
